allow: Bash(git add deploy/deploy.sh deploy/nginx-backend.conf deploy/nginx-frontend.conf deploy/DEPLOYMENT_FIX.md deploy/deploy.sh.backup)

Bash(git commit -m "fix: improve frontend health check reliability

- Change frontend health check from /health to / endpoint
- Add initial 5s wait before health checking
- Increase health check attempts to 60 with 3s interval
- Better error messages and progress indicators")
